title: Clean Energy to build first private natural gas fueling station for Houston METRO
content: Clean Energy Fuels Corp. (NASDAQ: CLNE), the largest provider of the cleanest fuel for the transportation market, has announced a new agreement with the Metropolitan Transit Authority of Harris County (METRO), the regionâ€™s largest public transport provider, to build the agencyâ€™s first private compressed natural gas (CNG) fueling station. The new state-of-the-art facility will be the first of its kind and will exclusively serve up to 120 of METROâ€™s newest natural gas-powered transit buses operating busy routes throughout Houston and beyond.
author: Analysts Account
